name: Q1 Financial Controls Audit
description: Comprehensive review of financial controls and reporting processes for Q1 2026

name: IT Security Compliance Review
description: Assessment of IT security controls, access management, and data protection protocols

name: SOX 404 Internal Controls Testing
description: Annual testing of internal controls over financial reporting per SOX requirements

name: Vendor Risk Assessment
description: Third-party vendor risk evaluation and contract compliance review

name: Payroll Process Audit
description: Review of payroll processing controls, accuracy, and compliance with labor regulations

name: Procurement Fraud Risk Review
description: Assessment of procurement processes for fraud risk and segregation of duties

name: Data Privacy Compliance Audit
description: Review of GDPR and CCPA compliance across data handling and processing systems

name: Fixed Assets Verification
description: Physical verification and reconciliation of fixed assets register

name: Revenue Recognition Review
description: Audit of revenue recognition practices and compliance with accounting standards

name: Business Continuity Plan Testing
description: Testing and evaluation of disaster recovery and business continuity procedures
